Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.FieldInfo

Packages that use FieldInfo
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.commons
Foundational classes and annotations shared across the Juneau Commons libraries.
org.apache.juneau.commons.bean
Bean-modeling layer for Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect
Comprehensive reflection utilities for working with classes, methods, fields, constructors, and annotations in a more convenient and type-safe way than the standard Java reflection APIs.
org.apache.juneau.marshall
Marshalling API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson
BSON (Binary JSON) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor
CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) marshalling support per RFC 8949.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.csv
CSV Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hjson
Hjson (Human JSON) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hocon
HOCON (Human-Optimized Config Object Notation) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.html
HTML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini
INI format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena
RDF Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
JSON Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown
Markdown serializer and parser support for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack
MessagePack Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.oapi
OpenAPI Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parquet
Apache Parquet serialization and parsing support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.plaintext
Plaintext Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.soap
SOAP/XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon
UON Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding
URL-Encoding Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml
XML Marshalling Support

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderMF
    AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderMF.on(FieldInfo... value)
    Appends the fields that this annotation applies to.
    AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderTMF
    AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderTMF.on(FieldInfo... value)
    Appends the fields that this annotation applies to.

    Field
    Description
    FieldInfo
    BeanPropertyMeta.Builder.innerField
     
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean that return FieldInfo
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FieldInfo
    BeanPropertyMeta.getField()
    Returns the field for this property.
    FieldInfo
    BeanPropertyMeta.getInnerField()
    Returns the field for this property even if the field is private.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.bean with parameters of type FieldInfo
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    BeanPropertyMeta.Builder
    BeanPropertyMeta.Builder.setField(FieldInfo value)
    Sets the field for this bean property.
    BeanPropertyMeta.Builder
    BeanPropertyMeta.Builder.setInnerField(FieldInfo value)
    Sets the inner field for this bean property from a FieldInfo.

  • Uses of FieldInfo in org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect that return FieldInfo
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FieldInfo
    FieldInfo.accessible()
    Attempts to call x.setAccessible(true) and quietly ignores security exceptions.
    static final FieldInfo
    ReflectionUtils.info(Field o)
    Returns the FieldInfo wrapper for the specified field.
    static FieldInfo
    FieldInfo.of(Field inner)
    Creates a FieldInfo wrapper for the specified field.
    static FieldInfo
    FieldInfo.of(ClassInfo declaringClass, Field inner)
    Creates a FieldInfo wrapper for the specified field.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect that return types with arguments of type FieldInfo
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<FieldInfo>
    ClassInfo.getAllFields()
    Returns all fields on this class and all parent classes.
    Optional<FieldInfo>
    ClassInfo.getDeclaredField(Predicate<FieldInfo> filter)
    Returns the first matching declared field on this class.
    List<FieldInfo>
    ClassInfo.getDeclaredFields()
    Returns all declared fields on this class.
    Optional<FieldInfo>
    ClassInfo.getPublicField(Predicate<FieldInfo> filter)
    Returns the first matching public field on this class.
    List<FieldInfo>
    ClassInfo.getPublicFields()
    Returns all public fields on this class.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect with parameters of type FieldInfo
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    FieldInfo.compareTo(FieldInfo o)
     
    Property.Builder<T,V>
    Property.Builder.field(FieldInfo field)
    Sets both getter and setter from a FieldInfo.
    <A extends Annotation>
    List<AnnotationInfo<A>>
    AnnotationProvider.find(Class<A> type, FieldInfo f, AnnotationTraversal... traversals)
    Finds annotations from a field using configurable traversal options.
    List<AnnotationInfo<? extends Annotation>>
    AnnotationProvider.find(FieldInfo f, AnnotationTraversal... traversals)
    Finds all annotations from a field using configurable traversal options, without filtering by annotation type.
    <A extends Annotation>
    boolean
    AnnotationProvider.has(Class<A> type, FieldInfo f, AnnotationTraversal... traversals)
    Checks if a field has the specified annotation.
    Method parameters in org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect with type arguments of type FieldInfo
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<FieldInfo>
    ClassInfo.getDeclaredField(Predicate<FieldInfo> filter)
    Returns the first matching declared field on this class.
    Optional<FieldInfo>
    ClassInfo.getPublicField(Predicate<FieldInfo> filter)
    Returns the first matching public field on this class.
